rulings.Case Title: F HOLIDILOFF VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY, A CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE CO. A CORP DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED-WITH LEAVE TO AMEND SO TO BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM NEEDS TO SET FORTH FACTS RE STATUTE OF FRAUDS AND GREATER DETAIL RE WHEN, WHO, HOW AND TERMS OF CONTRACT. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENCE CLAIM NEEDS TO PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW DUTY OWED AND HOW DEFENDANT REPRESENTATIVE CAUSED PLAINTIFF INJURIES, RE PUNITIVE NEEDS TO STATE FACTS TO SHOW MALICIOUS/DEPICABLE CONDUCT BY DEFENDANT.(302/REQ/RS)
